content:
💡 paperbanana | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated generation of publication-quality academic diagrams, statistical plots, and research visuals from text descriptions.
✨ Key Features: • Agentic framework for generating academic diagrams and plots • Supports OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Google Gemini providers • Two-phase multi-agent pipeline with iterative refinement • Multiple VLM and image generation providers • Input optimization layer
📖 Summary: PaperBanana is an open-source, community-driven implementation for automating the generation of academic illustrations, diagrams, and statistical plots from text descriptions. It extends the original PaperBanana concept with new domains like slide generation and offers a flexible, agentic framework supporting multiple LLM and VLM providers.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
